ddls:
CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the major */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department or faculty that offers the major */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* The average GPA of students who complete the major */,
  "job_placement_rate" REAL /* The percentage of students who find employment within 6 months of graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test board */,
  "board_name" TEXT /* Name of the test board */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test board */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the test in minutes */,
  "num_sections" INTEGER /* The number of sections in the test */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* The maximum possible score on the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_takers" (
  "taker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test taker */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test board the taker took the test from */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the test taker */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the test taker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the test taker */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was taken */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* The location where the test was taken */,
  "is_retake" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is a retake of the test */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* The date the test taker registered for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_takers_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES test_boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "taker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test taker */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intended major */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score on the test */,
  "erw_score" INTEGER /* Score in the Evidence-Based Reading and Writing (ERW) section */,
  "math_score" INTEGER /* Score in the Math section */,
  "section_scores" TEXT /* Detailed scores for each section of the test */,
  "percentile_rank" INTEGER /* The percentile rank of the test taker */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* The status of the test (e.g., completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_taker_id FOREIGN KEY ("taker_id") REFERENCES test_takers ("taker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "major_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major preference */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major */,
  "num_test_takers" INTEGER /* Number of test takers interested in the major */,
  "percent_interest" REAL /* Percentage of test takers interested in the major */,
  "average_score" REAL /* The average score of test takers interested in the major */,
  "top_schools" TEXT /* List of top schools where students interested in the major are from */,
  "interest_trend" TEXT /* Trend of interest over time (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_major_preferences_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "taker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test taker */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the test taker */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the test taker */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the test taker */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school the test taker attends */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the test taker is from */,
  "parental_education" TEXT /* The highest level of education completed by the test taker's parents */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* The socioeconomic status of the test taker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_taker_id FOREIGN KEY ("taker_id") REFERENCES test_takers ("taker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the user session in minutes */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* The device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
